# Nodecraft - AI Context

Nodecraft builds fast, conversion-first websites with clean tracking and SEO foundations—then scales results with performance marketing. Pay monthly or commission custom builds.

## Core Documentation
- [Website Solutions Overview](https://nodecraft.tech/website-solutions): comprehensive breakdown of our digital engineering capabilities.
- [Premium Static Sites](https://nodecraft.tech/website-solutions/premium-static): high-performance marketing landing pages.
- [Custom Enterprise Applications](https://nodecraft.tech/website-solutions/custom-enterprise): bespoke React and Next.js applications for scaling businesses.
- [eCommerce Development](https://nodecraft.tech/website-solutions/ecommerce): conversion-first storefronts and scalable builds.
- [Redesign Rescue](https://nodecraft.tech/website-solutions/redesign-rescue): transformative UX/UI overhauls for legacy platforms.
- [Digital Marketing](https://nodecraft.tech/digital-marketing): paid media, social execution, and local visibility run as one system.
- [Performance Marketing](https://nodecraft.tech/digital-marketing/performance-marketing): CAC-disciplined acquisition across Meta and Google.
- [Social Media Management](https://nodecraft.tech/digital-marketing/management): strategy, content planning, execution, and community handling.
- [Local SEO](https://nodecraft.tech/digital-marketing/local-seo): Google Maps and local search optimization for calls and bookings.

## Pricing & Philosophy
- [Pricing Model](https://nodecraft.tech/pricing): choose Pay Monthly for low-risk launch, or custom projects for complex builds and growth programs.

## Optional Resources
- [Our Process](https://nodecraft.tech/process): transparent, phase-by-phase breakdown of our operational methodologies.
- [Agency Blog](https://nodecraft.tech/blog): deep dives into engineering, design philosophy, and performance marketing strategies.
- [About Us](https://nodecraft.tech/about): leadership, mission, and guiding principles.
